692 N0450C_LAST_ATMPTED_GDR_DT N0450C_LAST_ATMPTED_GDR_DT N0450C Date of Last Attempted GDR CHAR 8 The data in this column indicates the date of the last attempt to do a gradual dose reduction (GDR) of
